text.title: A/B Testing Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from experiment design to ship/kill decision.

step.name: wire-deterministic-bucket
step.action: Implement bucket(user_id) = (int.from_bytes(blake2b((user_id+experiment_id+salt).encode(), digest_size=8).digest(), "big") % 100) < threshold. Verify in unit tests that the same user always lands in the same arm.
step.output: bucket function deployed to web + mobile + server
step.decision-gate: If two surfaces use different hash inputs, fail sticky-across-surfaces and rework.

step.name: emit-exposure
step.action: Fire exposure event the first time a user hits the gate. Use idempotent event keys.
step.output: exposure events flowing to stats engine

step.name: emit-conversion
step.action: Fire conversion event ONLY for users with a prior exposure within the experiment window. Conversions without prior exposure are dropped.
step.output: conversion events flowing to stats engine

step.name: analyse
step.action: Compute z-test for proportions; build Wilson 95% CI on lift; compute SRM chi-square p-value against expected_split. Run `templates/analyzer.py`.
step.decision-gate: srm_chi_square_p < 0.001 → decision=invalid-srm; investigate bucket leak before any other interpretation.

step.name: decide
step.action: Sample size < planned → decision=invalid-underpowered. CI spans zero → decision=kill or extend. CI strictly > 0 and SRM clean → decision=ship. Record artefact + close flag.
